result.noResultsYet: No published results for this race
result.selectRace: Select a race above to view results

programme.pointsByRankDesc: 1st earns N points, 2nd earns N-1, etc.
programme.velocityPercentageDesc: Score = pigeon's % of winner's velocity per race
programme.totalVelocityDesc: Sum of all velocities across races
programme.pigeonsPerRaceHint: e.g. 3 means only the top 3 velocities from each loft count per race
programme.minRacesPigeon: Minimum races a pigeon must enter
programme.allRacesRequired: Must enter ALL races in the programme
programme.minimumRaceCount: Must enter at least N races
programme.minimumRacePercentage: Must enter at least X% of races
programme.addRaces: Add published races from your club
programme.calculationRequired: Calculate all results before publishing the programme
programme.runCalculation: Run the calculation from the Programme page first

template.achievementPh: e.g. First place in the 500km race
template.printToCreate: Print or download a result sheet to create a job record

landing.heroSub: From ETS file upload to printed certificates — PRC handles race results, programme scoring, Ace Pigeon rankings, multi-language output, and live integration with PigeonLoftManager.com.
landing.featTitle: Everything a club needs. Nothing it doesn't.
landing.featSub: Built specifically for pigeon racing federations. Every feature designed around how clubs actually run their seasons.
landing.feat1Desc: Upload ETS clock files or enter arrival times manually. Velocities calculated instantly from GPS coordinates.
landing.feat1Detail: Supports bulk ETS import, manual entry, velocity calculation, tie-breaking rules, and real-time result publishing.
landing.feat2Desc: Best Loft, Ace Pigeon, and Super Ace competitions run automatically across your full season.
landing.feat2Detail: 4 scoring methods: Average velocity · Points by rank · Velocity % · Total velocity. Configurable per programme.
landing.feat3Desc: Professional result sheets, certificates, and awards — print directly from the browser or export to PDF.
landing.feat3Detail: 50 race result layouts · 20 Best Loft · 20 Ace Pigeon · 20 Super Ace · 50 certificates. RTL-ready.
landing.feat4Desc: Full UI and printed output in English, French, Flemish, Arabic, Chinese, and Spanish.
landing.feat4Detail: Arabic prints right-to-left with proper RTL certificate layout. All column headers translated automatically.
landing.feat5Desc: Fanciers on PigeonLoftManager.com can link their account and have results appear on their loft profile.
landing.feat5Detail: Secure club-to-PLM connection. Club manager approval required. Revoke access at any time. Full activity log.
landing.feat6Desc: Club scores aggregate into national federation rankings. Country managers combine results from all participating clubs into official championship tables.
landing.feat6Detail: Cross-club velocity normalization. National Ace Pigeon. National Best Loft. Multi-club championship totals. Published to all members instantly.
landing.tplTitle: Print-ready results. Out of the box.
landing.tplNote: All templates print directly from the browser. Arabic certificates render full RTL layout. Translated column headers in all 6 languages — French, Flemish, Arabic, Chinese, Spanish.
landing.integSub: Fanciers on PigeonLoftManager.com can link their account with their club on PigeonResultCalculator. Club managers approve. Results appear automatically on their loft profile.
landing.step1Desc: A fancier creates their loft profile on PigeonLoftManager.com and finds their club on PRC.
landing.step2Desc: The club manager on PRC reviews the request and approves the link with a single click.
landing.step3Desc: The club manager reviews and confirms the request. The fancier's PLM loft profile is now linked to their club record on PRC.
landing.step4Desc: Race results, Ace rankings, Best Loft scores, and Super Ace status sync automatically.
landing.syncLabel: What appears on your fancier's PLM profile
landing.sync1Desc: Finish position in every race, updated minutes after results publish
landing.sync2Desc: Best metres per minute per race, and all-time personal record tracked automatically
landing.sync3Desc: Running Ace Pigeon ranking across all programme races in real time
landing.sync4Desc: Your loft's aggregate score in the season programme competition
landing.sync5Desc: Elite qualification for pigeons that entered and placed in every single race
landing.sync6Desc: Digital copies of race, Ace Pigeon, and season award certificates
landing.seasonTitle: From first entry to final certificate.
landing.seasonSub: PRC manages the full arc of a pigeon racing season — programme setup, race day, results, and awards.
landing.phase1Desc: Fanciers register their pigeons and club managers set up the season programme with race dates, distances, and scoring rules.
landing.phase2Desc: ETS clock files upload in seconds. Manual entries accepted too. Velocities calculated instantly from GPS coordinates.
landing.phase3Desc: Results publish the moment a race closes. All 160 print templates available immediately. PLM profiles update automatically.
landing.phase4Desc: Ace Pigeon, Best Loft, and Super Ace programmes finalize at season end. Certificates generated with one click.
landing.ctaTitle: Your next race, ready in minutes.
landing.ctaSub: Upload your ETS file. Watch results rank instantly. Print professional sheets. Share achievements with PigeonLoftManager. Everything included.
landing.ctaFootnote: No credit card. Unlimited races. Free for clubs.
landing.footerCopy: © {{year}} PigeonResultCalculator. Built for the pigeon racing community.

links.pigeonLoftManagerDesc: Loft management software trusted by thousands of fanciers worldwide

integ.title: External Integrations
integ.subtitle: Manage account link requests from PigeonLoftManager.com and other external platforms
integ.howDesc: Fanciers who use PigeonLoftManager.com can request to link their account to your club on Pigeon Result Calculator. Once you approve, their race results, Ace Pigeon awards, and Best Loft rankings are automatically shared with their loft profile on PigeonLoftManager.
integ.step1: Fancier sends link request from PigeonLoftManager
integ.step2: You review and approve or reject here
integ.step4: Fancier sees live results on their loft profile
integ.noPendingDesc: When fanciers on PigeonLoftManager send a link request, it will appear here.
integ.noActiveDesc: Approved link requests will appear here.
integ.approvingMeansDesc: You'll issue an access token to {{platform}}. They can then read this fancier's published race results, Ace Pigeon awards, Super Ace Pigeon awards, and Best Loft results. No data is modified. You can revoke access at any time.
integ.rejectReasonPlaceholder: e.g. Cannot verify identity, fancier not registered with this club
integ.revokeConfirm: Revoke this integration? PigeonLoftManager will lose access to this fancier's results.

fancierInteg.title: My Integrations
fancierInteg.subtitle: Connected external platforms that can read your results
fancierInteg.explainerDesc: If you use PigeonLoftManager.com, you can authorise it to read your race results, Ace Pigeon awards, Super Ace awards, and Best Loft rankings — all displayed on your loft profile.
fancierInteg.step2: Go to your loft settings and find "Connect to Pigeon Result Calculator"
fancierInteg.step4: PigeonLoftManager sends a link request to your club manager
fancierInteg.step5: Your club manager approves the request
fancierInteg.step6: Your results appear automatically on PigeonLoftManager
fancierInteg.privacy: Privacy: Only published results are shared. No personal contact information, no unpublished data, no write access. You can revoke access at any time.
fancierInteg.requestSent: Your request was sent {{date}}. Your club manager will review it and approve or reject it.
fancierInteg.tokenDesc: This token confirms the request came from your account.
fancierInteg.revokeDesc: Revoking will immediately cut PigeonLoftManager's access to your results.
fancierInteg.revokeConfirm: Revoke this integration? PigeonLoftManager will no longer be able to read your results.
fancierInteg.rejectedRetry: To try again, initiate a new link request from PigeonLoftManager.com.
fancierInteg.revokedRetry: To re-enable, send a new link request from PigeonLoftManager.com.

errors.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
errors.serverError: A server error occurred. Please try again.
errors.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please log in again.
